projectDescription: A selective learning and memory substrate for LLM and agentic systems, providing typed, revisable, decayable memory with competence learning and trust-aware retrieval.
keyFeatures: Typed memory records (episodic, working, semantic, competence, plan_graph) with explicit schemas and lifecycle rules
Revisable knowledge with supersede, fork, retract, merge, and contest operations and full audit trails
Trust-aware retrieval with configurable sensitivity levels (public, low, medium, high, hyper)
Time-based salience decay with exponential curves and automatic pruning
Background consolidation extracting semantic facts and competence records from episodic traces
LLM-backed semantic extraction pipeline (Postgres + LLM tier)
Vector-aware retrieval with pgvector embedding similarity scoring
SQLCipher encryption at rest, optional TLS, API key authentication, and rate limiting
15-method gRPC API with TypeScript and Python client SDKs
Embedded Go library mode (no daemon required)
Observability metrics: retrieval usefulness, competence success rate, plan reuse frequency, revision rate
OpenClaw plugin for automatic memory injection into agent turns
publicApiSurface: Membrane.Supersede(ctx, oldID, newRec, actor, rationale) (*MemoryRecord, error)
Membrane.Fork(ctx, sourceID, forkedRec, actor, rationale) (*MemoryRecord, error)
Membrane.Merge(ctx, ids, mergedRec, actor, rationale) (*MemoryRecord, error)
Membrane.Contest(ctx, id, contestingRef, actor, rationale) error
Membrane.Penalize(ctx, id, amount, actor, rationale) error
gRPC: IngestEvent, IngestToolOutput, IngestObservation, IngestOutcome, IngestWorkingState
gRPC: Supersede, Fork, Retract, Merge, Contest
